resourceTemplates.name: list-anthropic-memory-versions
resourceTemplates.title: List Anthropic memory versions
resourceTemplates.description: List memory versions in an Anthropic memory store. The secure scraper requires the current user to be an owner of the parent memory store.

resourceTemplates.name: get-anthropic-memory-version
resourceTemplates.title: Get Anthropic memory version
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve an Anthropic memory version. The secure scraper requires the current user to be an owner of the parent memory store.
